description.value:
Trigger Your turn begins, and you're grabbing or restraining a creature within your reach.

Directed by the sensitive nerves entwined within each of your limbs, your tentacles reflexively cling onto whatever you're grappling, even if your attention is directed elsewhere. Attempt a @Check[flat|dc:16]. If you succeed, you can extend the duration of the grappled creature's @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Grabbed] or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Restrained] condition until the end of your next turn. If you have any special abilities or free actions that would normally be triggered when you [[/act grapple]] a creature, you can't use them as part of this action.
